description: Harness smoke test - confirms Claude session + MCP server reachable
final_text: The method signature is: **`public static boolean open()`** in `org.dreambot.api.methods.container.impl.bank.Bank`, which takes no arguments and returns a `boolean` indicating whether the bank was successfully opened (there's also an overload `open(@Nullable BankLocation bank)` that lets you specify which bank to open).
